ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, RecordType.Id ="012b0000000oQix", $User.IsFinanceManager__c =false, NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"Rechnung")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"rechnung")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"RECHNUNG")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"Invoice")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"invoice")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"INVOICE")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"Gutschrift")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"gutschrift")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"GUTSCHRIFT")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"Credit Note")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"Credit note")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"credit note")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"CREDIT NOTE")) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Invoice Title must contain either "Rechnung" or "Invoice" (IN019)
